_info: Written by louwok.com/admin. index.html reads this at runtime.

menu.name: Plain Fried Rice
menu.desc: The St. Louis rice house foundation. Egg, bean sprouts, and green onion wok-tossed in a screaming-hot wok with seasoned rice, cooked fast and fresh to order. Straightforward, satisfying, and rooted in the classic STL scene.

menu.name: Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: All-white chicken wok-fired with seasoned rice, egg, bean sprouts, soy, and green onion. A St. Louis rice house classic—simple, bold, and built on the kind of no-frills flavors that made Midwest takeout a staple. Cooked fresh to order and served hot, Lou Wok style.

menu.name: Beef Fried Rice
menu.desc: Sliced beef wok-fired with seasoned rice, egg, bean sprouts, and green onion, finished in a savory soy-based blend. A St. Louis rice house staple built on simple, bold ingredients—classic Midwest takeout flavor, cooked fresh to order and served hot in true Lou Wok style.

menu.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
menu.desc: Plump shrimp wok-fired with rice, egg, green onion, and our signature blend of seasonings. Inspired by the neighborhood rice houses of St. Louis, this Midwest takeout favorite is cooked fresh to order and packed with the bold, savory flavor that put St. Louis-style fried rice on the map.

menu.name: Crab Rangoon
menu.desc: Available in 4 or 8 pieces. Crispy golden crab rangoon filled with a rich, sweet creamy crab blend and fried to perfection. A St. Louis Chinese takeout favorite and the perfect side to our wok-fired fried rice.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Chicken)
menu.desc: Our signature egg foo young patty topped with seasoned chicken, crisp lettuce, tomato, red onion, pickles, and mayo on soft white bread. A legendary St. Louis takeout classic, now served fresh in Phoenix.

menu.name: Pineapple Chicken Fried Rice
menu.desc: Tender chicken, sweet pineapple, and wok-fired rice come together in the perfect balance of savory and sweet. A bold twist on a Midwest favorite, cooked fresh to order with Lou Wok flavor in every bite.

menu.name: Ultimate Fried Rice
menu.desc: A loaded feast of our signature St. Louis-style fried rice piled high with egg, tender chicken, juicy shrimp, savory beef, and fresh vegetables, all wok-fired together with our house seasoning for the ultimate Rice House experience.

menu.name: Fried Chicken
menu.desc: Crispy, seasoned chicken fried golden brown and served hot and fresh. 8-piece

menu.name: Vess Soda
menu.desc: A St. Louis original and a staple in every rice house across the city. Ice-cold, bold, and nostalgic, Vess Soda has been a Midwest carryout favorite for generations. Black Cherry, Cream Soda, Orange, Grape, Strawberry, & Pineapple..

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Veggie)
menu.desc: A St. Louis Chinese takeout classic featuring our signature golden egg foo young patty on soft white bread with crisp lettuce, tomato, red onion, pickles, and mayo. A Midwest favorite, served fresh at Lou Wok Rice House in Phoenix.

menu.name: St. Paul Sandwich (Deluxe)
menu.desc: Build your perfect St. Paul Sandwich with any two proteins—chicken, shrimp, or beef—stacked on our signature egg foo young patty with lettuce, tomato, red onion, pickles, and mayo on soft white bread. A St. Louis takeout classic, now served fresh in Phoenix.

menu.name: Mystic Carrot Juice
menu.desc: A bright, refreshing blend of carrot and fruit juices with a smooth, naturally sweet finish. Served ice-cold, it’s the nostalgic Midwest drink that pairs perfectly with fried rice, St. Paul sandwiches, and crispy wings—Lou Wok style.

menu.name: Bottled Water
menu.desc: 16.9 fl oz. bottle of water on chill.

menu.name: Lou Wok Box Combo
menu.desc: The combo that inspired it all. A full order of our signature St. Louis-style fried rice, an Original St. Paul Sandwich, four pieces of golden fried chicken, four crispy crab rangoons, and your choice of Vess Soda or Mystic Carrot Juice. Straight from the St. Louis rice house tradition, brought to Phoenix and cooked fresh to order with Midwest flavor and wok-fired soul.

menu.name: Egg Roll (Veggie)
menu.desc: Fresh cabbage, carrots, and vegetables wrapped in a crispy shell and fried golden brown. Two  light, crunchy, and the perfect sidekicks to a box of Lou Wok fried rice.

menu.name: Funnel Cake
menu.desc: Golden, crispy, and made from our signature sweet cream batter, then dusted with powdered sugar. A warm, fresh-fried classic that's the perfect finish to your Lou Wok feast.

menu.name: Boneless Hot Braised Chicken
menu.desc: Tender boneless chicken simmered in our signature savory brown sauce for a bold St. Louis takeout classic. Served with a half order box of plain white rice.

menu.name: The Show-Me Combo
menu.desc: A St. Louis rice house favorite featuring a whole order of plain Fried Rice, tender Boneless Hot Braised Chicken, 2 egg rolls, 4 Crab Rangoons, and your choice of beverage—a hearty taste of the Show-Me State, served fresh at Lou Wok.

seo.title: Lou Wok Rice House | St. Louis Style Chinese Fried Rice & St. Paul Sandwiches in Phoenix, AZ
seo.description: Lou Wok Rice House brings authentic St. Louis-style fried rice to Phoenix, inspired by the legendary Chinese takeout flavors of St. Louis. Enjoy wok-fired chicken, beef, shrimp, and vegetable fried rice, crispy fried chicken, and iconic St. Paul sandwiches.
seo.keywords: Phoenix Best Chinese Food, Phoenix Chinese Take-Out, Best Phoenix Fried Rice, Black-Owned, St. Louis Style Fried Rice, Chinese Fried Rice, Chicken Fried Rice, Shrimp Fried Rice, Combo Fried Rice, Wok Fried Rice, Best Fried Rice Phoenix, St. Louis Chinese Food, St. Paul Sandwich, Chinese Food Phoenix, Chinese Food Truck, Original St. Louis, Chinamen, Laveen Chinese Food, Chandler Chinese Food, Avondale Chinese Food, Mesa Chinese Food, Tempe Chinese Food, Scottsdale Chinese Food, Glendale Chinese Food, Fried Chicken and Fried Rice, Rice House Style Fried Rice, Authentic Fried Rice, Takeout Fried Rice, Loaded Fried Rice, Phoenix Food Truck, Lou Wok Rice House, Original St. Louis Fried Rice

featured.label: Featured Item
featured.title:
THE ST. PAUL
SANDWICH
featured.desc: Born in St. Louis, Perfected at Lou Wok.

details.label: The Original St. Paul Sandwich. Built Different.

hero.sub: Fired over high heat. Built on flavor. Lou Wok serves up wok-tossed rice, fried chicken, crab rangoon, egg rolls and the legendary St. Paul sandwich — every plate made to order, every time.

events.note: [BREWERY] Brewery vendor program with dedicated food truck area; craft-beer crowd pairs well with wok/fried menu. Apply directly to Four Peaks vendor program.

events.title: First Friday — Roosevelt Row Food Truck Court
events.location: Roosevelt Row Arts District, Phoenix, AZ 85004
events.note: [FESTIVAL] Monthly First Friday art walk with a dedicated food truck court; big evening crowd, dessert & late-night friendly (good for funnel cake). Apply to RoRo food truck court.

events.title: Queen Creek Friday Night Food Truck Festival
events.note: [FESTIVAL] Weekly Friday-evening festival, 15-25 trucks, live music, family crowd. Fast-growing east-valley suburb. Apply to organizer for a spot.

events.title: Uptown Farmers Market (apply/vend)
events.location: Uptown Plaza, 5757 N Central Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85012
events.note: [MARKET] Weekly Saturday market with rotating food trucks; upscale north-central crowd. Apply to vendor program in advance. Verify weekly attendance before committing.

events.title: Downtown Phoenix Farmers Market (Open Air)
events.note: [MARKET] Weekend Open Air Market; ~5 food trucks each Saturday, strong local foot traffic. Apply through market vendor coordinator.

branding.name: Lou Wok Rice House
branding.tagline: Wok-fired Midwest flavor. St. Louis roots. Phoenix made.
branding.footerCredit: Built with fire in the Valley

settings.pickupInstructions: Pickup only. Estimated Wait Time 10-15 minutes

notify.orderSmsTemplate:
Lou Wok Rice House{restaurant}: Order #LW-260710-4821{orderNo} is in the wok!

Total: $24.50{total}. Your order will be freshly prepared and ready for pickup in approximately 15–20 minutes. We'll text you when it's ready. Reply STOP to opt out.
